featured-book.title: The Other Steve Schrader: New and Selected Writing By Steven Schrader
featured-book.subtitle: These are new and older autobiographical stories about trying to find my own way of being in the world. They are set largely in New York City where I grew up and still live, from my early childhood in Washington Heights to my adolescence, adulthood and older years on the Upper West Side. I hope these stories capture the discoveries I made along the way about who I was, and who I hoped to become.

bio.title: Steven Schrader's Bio
bio.subtitle: Steven Schrader is a passionate writer known for his captivating stories and unique voice. With a talent for weaving words into memorable narratives, Steven invites readers to explore new perspectives and discover the power of imagination through his work.
